data.raw: Build a settings panel with toggle controls and tooltips.

states.empty: Panel renders with default toggle states
states.loading: Save button shows spinner while persisting
states.error: Inline error replaces toast on save failure
states.success: Save button confirms with checkmark for 1s
states.disabled: Toggles disabled while save is in flight

fields.notifications: Email me when a job finishes

tooltips.notifications: Sent at most once per hour.

a11y.labels: every toggle has a visible label and matching for/id
a11y.focus: save button reachable after the last toggle

questions: > Input: Build a settings panel with toggle controls and tooltips.
> 1. Confirm — lock this brief and advance to apply
> 2. Revise — send feedback; loops back to ui-design-brief

**Recommendation: 1 — Confirm** — the brief covers all required slots and microcopy is final. Caveat: flip to 2 only if a string, state, or component is wrong; do not confirm strings you have not read.
